creator: gerrit.beine@gmx.de
text:
Am Sonntag, 13. Januar 2008 13:30:08 schrieb Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of java/eclipse-EPIC,
>
> Please note that PR ports/119625 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/119625

I don't agree with this modifications and the upgrade, because 0.6.18 it is 
not officially released by the EPIC-Team.

So long...

Gerrit
